'''Jaska''' was a [[Red giant/Legends|red giant]]–type [[Star/Legends|star]]. It was located in the [[Joralla system/Legends|Joralla system]],<ref name="TSWPC" /> a part of the [[Mektrun sector/Legends|Mektrun sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" />

Jaska was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by three [[Planet/Legends|planets]]: the [[Temperature/Legends|hot]], rocky [[Manalin]]; the temperate [[Grall]]; and the terrestrial [[Joralla]]. The inner two worlds had [[Poison/Legends|poisonous]] [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheres]].<ref name="TSWPC" />

Joralla,<ref name="TSWPC" /> considered to be the primary planet of its [[Star system/Legends|star system]],<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|173|Joralla}}</ref> had breathable air and circled its star once every 310 local [[Standard day/Legends|days]]. It was a tropical [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] world that Jaska bathed in [[Color/Legends|crimson]] light.<ref name="TSWPC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jaska was first mentioned in ''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume One]]'', a [[1991]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="PoG1">''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume One]]''</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Joralla system, and therefore Jaska, in grid square L-17.<ref name="TEA" />
